title: Data files: Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals developmental heterogeneity among Plasmodium berghei sporozoites
author: Ruberto, Anthony
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Count matrices, scripts, and output files generated from the scRNA-seq analyses performed in  “Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals developmental heterogeneity among Plasmodium berghei sporozoites”  by  Anthony A. Ruberto, Caitlin Bourke, Nicolas Merienne, Thomas Obadia, Rogerio Amino, and Ivo Mueller .
steps_raw: Count matrices, scripts, and output files generated from the scRNA-seq analyses performed in  “Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals developmental heterogeneity among Plasmodium berghei sporozoites”  by  Anthony A. Ruberto, Caitlin Bourke, Nicolas Merienne, Thomas Obadia, Rogerio Amino, and Ivo Mueller .
